pageContext.name: Jujutsu Kaisen Adverge Motion Vol. 2
pageContext.description: Jujutsu Kaisen Adverge Motion returns with Volume 2! Featuring chibi style characters from Jujutsu Kaisen in action poses from the anime measuring approx. 2.17'. The anime figure lineup includes: Yuji Itadori, Kenjin Nanami, Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Jogo, Mahito, and Sukuna. This is a COMPLETE SET of all 7 Characters! Each character includes a stand to support their action pose.
